steps.title: Find the increase
steps.content:
Subtract the original bill from the new bill:
$$
86.12-81.25=4.87
$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content: Divide by the original bill and multiply by $100\%$: $$ \frac{4.87}{81.25}\cdot 100\%=5.9938\% $$ Rounded to the nearest tenth, this is $6.0\%$. The answer is D.
